response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems experience with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks explicit executive leadership experience, fintech-specific expertise, or a proven track record in scaling engineering teams to the required size (10+ to 30+). His work on agentic frameworks is promising but not clearly production-grade or in regulated environments.
strengths: Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators, agentic workflows at re:cinq).
Deep expertise in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and real-time data processing (e.g., Dunnhumby, GISCollective).
Strong technical breadth across languages, frameworks, and domains (web, mobile, embedded, fintech-adjacent).
concerns: No explicit CTO or executive leadership experience; roles are primarily individual contributor or senior developer.
Limited evidence of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers.
Fintech experience is tangential (e.g., pricing optimization at Optilyz) and lacks depth in credit systems or regulatory compliance.
